parents.subject: LU-13571 lnet: Correct handling of NETWORK_TIMEOUT status

commit.subject: LU-13571 tests: Test health and resends for network timeout
commit.message:
LU-13571 tests: Test health and resends for network timeout

The LNET_MSG_STATUS_NETWORK_TIMEOUT health status should cause both
local NI and remote NI health status to be decremented on MR peers,
but it should not cause resends.

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-9342
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I7dce41a7aa9569a00bcf943b3d31e8f3d4d15b0c
